name: RNB Retail and Brands AB (publ)
summary: RNB Retail and Brands AB (publ) owns, develops, and operates fashion wear, ready-to-wear clothing, accessories, jewelry, and cosmetics stores in Sweden, Norway, Finland, and internationally. It sells its products through Brothers store concept, which offers tailored and casual fashion wear for men; and Polarn O. Pyret store concept that provides clothing for babies and children. The company also sells its products through departments and stores under the NK name in Stockholm and Gothenburg; and Man of a Kind, an e-commerce concept that provides luxury brands with Nordic aesthetics, as well as offers services, such as made-to-measure, style advice, and articles for masculine style and fashion. It operates approximately 190 stores and e-commerce platforms. The company is based in Stockholm, Sweden.
